entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A highly nutritious, gluten-free crop rich in calcium, iron, and dietary fiber, predominantly grown in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The global regions where finger millet is predominantly grown

entities.name: CALCIUM
entities.description: A nutritional component found in high levels in finger millet

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A nutritional component found in high levels in finger millet

entities.name: DIETARY FIBER
entities.description: A nutritional component found in high levels in finger millet

entities.name: GLUTEN-FREE
entities.description: The characteristic of finger millet being free of gluten

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The center of genetic diversity for finger millet and the primary study area

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of genetic characteristics within the finger millet population in Ethiopia

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The actual yield of finger millet per hectare in Ethiopia

entities.name: POTENTIAL YIELD
entities.description: The maximum possible yield of finger millet under optimal conditions

entities.name: YIELD GAP
entities.description: The difference between the potential yield and the actual productivity of finger millet

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Biological factors that contribute to the yield gap in finger millet

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-biological environmental factors that contribute to the yield gap in finger millet

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Social and economic factors that limit finger millet productivity

entities.name: VARIETY DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of creating and releasing improved finger millet varieties

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY RURAL APPRAISAL
entities.description: A study approach used to document production opportunities, constraints, and farmer-preferred traits

entities.name: SNNPR
entities.description: The Southern Nation Nationalities People Region in Ethiopia, one of the study areas

entities.name: OROMIA REGION
entities.description: A region in Ethiopia, one of the study areas

entities.name: SEMI-STRUCTURED QUESTIONNAIRE
entities.description: A data collection tool used in the participatory rural appraisal study

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP DISCUSSION
entities.description: A data collection tool used in the participatory rural appraisal study

entities.name: HAND WEEDING
entities.description: A weed management practice used by finger millet farmers

entities.name: CHEMICAL HERBICIDES
entities.description: A weed management practice used by finger millet farmers

entities.name: SOLE CROPPING
entities.description: The practice of planting finger millet as the only crop in a field

entities.name: MIXED CROPPING
entities.description: The practice of planting finger millet with other crops

entities.name: CROP ROTATION
entities.description: The practice of rotating finger millet with other crops

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: A major abiotic constraint to finger millet production

entities.name: LACK OF IMPROVED VARIETIES
entities.description: A constraint to finger millet production due to unavailability of high-yielding varieties

entities.name: LACK OF FINANCIAL RESOURCES
entities.description: A socio-economic constraint limiting finger millet production

entities.name: SMALL LAND HOLDINGS
entities.description: A socio-economic constraint limiting finger millet production

entities.name: LIMITED ACCESS TO SEED
entities.description: A constraint limiting the availability of quality seeds for farmers

entities.name: SHORTAGE OF FERTILIZERS
entities.description: A constraint affecting soil nutrient availability for finger millet

entities.name: POOR SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: A condition that limits the productivity of finger millet

entities.name: SHORTAGE OF DRAUGHT POWER
entities.description: A constraint related to the lack of animal power for farming

entities.name: LABOUR SHORTAGES
entities.description: A constraint related to the unavailability of farm labor

entities.name: HIGH LABOUR COSTS
entities.description: A socio-economic constraint increasing the cost of production

entities.name: HIGH GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A farmer-preferred trait for finger millet varieties

entities.name: COMPACT HEAD SHAPE
entities.description: A farmer-preferred trait for finger millet varieties

entities.name: ENJERA-MAKING QUALITY
entities.description: A farmer-preferred trait related to the suitability of the grain for making enjera

entities.name: HIGH MARKETABILITY
entities.description: A farmer-preferred trait related to the ease of selling the crop

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: A farmer-preferred trait related to the short duration of the crop cycle

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to resolve and prioritize farmer-preferred traits

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of improving finger millet varieties by incorporating preferred traits and overcoming constraints
